ui_locale.label: User interface locale
ui_locale.description: Locale in which to render the user interface; also controls localization of dates, numbers, etc.

ui_theme.label: User interface theme
ui_theme.description: Theme set (views, CSS, graphics to display UI in)

ui_show_breadcrumbs.label: Show current location as 'breadcrumb' trail
ui_show_breadcrumbs.description: If set to 'yes' the path of menu options taken to reach the current screen will be displayed at the top of every screen

clear_quicksearch.label: Autoclear previous Quicksearch
clear_quicksearch.description: Determines if the previous Quicksearch terms clear automatically when a new search is performed, or if the search terms remain editable for the next search.

persistent_search.label: Remember last search or browse
persistent_search.description: Determines if the last performed search, basic or advanced, or browse is retained after navigation away from results display

list_public_sets.label: Include public sets from other users as search options
list_public_sets.description: Show sets marked as public from other users in the search tools set list

immediate_download_of_exports.label: Download export data in editor immediately
immediate_download_of_exports.description: When exporting data from a record in the editor, download data immediately or show optional file renaming and/or upload to GitHub or ResourceSpace?

use_displays_for_pdf_summary_output.label: Use displays for PDF summary output?
use_displays_for_pdf_summary_output.description: Include all available displays as options for downloadable PDF summaries?

autodelete_sets.label: Auto-delete old sets?
autodelete_sets.description: Automatically remove sets older than the specified age threshold?

autodelete_sets_age_threshold.label: Auto-delete sets old than (days)
autodelete_sets_age_threshold.description: Age, in days, after which set should be deleted when auto-deletion of sets is enabled

autodelete_sets_age_mode.label: Auto-delete set age mode
autodelete_sets_age_mode.description: Method used to calculate age of set. Age may be calcuated as number of days since the set was created, or the number of days since the set was last edited or used in a search or for a report.

autodelete_sets_default.label: Auto-delete setting default for new sets
autodelete_sets_default.description: Set newly created sets to auto-delete?

cataloguing_locale.label: Default cataloguing locale
cataloguing_locale.description: Locale to default record and attribute locale setting to

cataloguing_delete_reference_handling_de.label: Default action for handling references for an item to be deleted
cataloguing_delete_reference_handling_de.description: When deleting an item it is possible to move any references to or from that item to another. Alternatively references can be deleted with the item. The default behavior may be set here.
